final_session_calls.command:
cd /work && python -c "
content = open('tests/test_basic.py').read()
content = content.replace(
    '''chain(
        ((x, \"True\") for x in (\"1\", \"true\", \"t\", \"yes\", \"y\", \"on\")),
        ((x, \"False\") for x in (\"0\", \"false\", \"f\", \"no\", \"n\", \"off\")),
    )''',
    '''list(chain(
        ((x, \"True\") for x in (\"1\", \"true\", \"t\", \"yes\", \"y\", \"on\")),
        ((x, \"False\") for x in (\"0\", \"false\", \"f\", \"no\", \"n\", \"off\")),
    ))'''
)
open('tests/test_basic.py', 'w').write(content)
"
